body:
Good morning, Alexandria Friends!

I had a busy last four days dashing, but it looks like ya’ll have been busy too!

Welcome to all the new folks! I’m glad you’re here! 🖤🖤🖤

At some point today, I should be continuing with my spicy sapphic song scenes. For the new folks, here are the ones I’ve posted so far.

Zolita - Bedspell
Dove Cameron - Boyfriend
Sizzy Rocket - Bestie
Zolita - Like Heaven
Tracy Chapman - Fast Car

I just had an idea that I should put some day themed images
reblog_comment:
Good morning, Alexandria Friends!

I had a busy last four days dashing, but it looks like ya’ll have been busy too!

Welcome to all the new folks! I’m glad you’re here! 🖤🖤🖤

At some point today, I should be continuing with my spicy sapphic song scenes. For the new folks, here are the ones I’ve posted so far.

Zolita - Bedspell
Dove Cameron - Boyfriend
Sizzy Rocket - Bestie
Zolita - Like Heaven
Tracy Chapman - Fast Car

I just had an idea that I should put some day themed images on these posts. Guess I will have to work on that soon. And I didn’t forget about the other photos I promised a few weeks back! 😘 There have not been forgotten, just on the back burner for now.

I hope you all have a wonderful day and I’ll see you all around! 🖤🖤🖤
